title: 10mm Compression Equal Tee
features: This listing is for a Pack of 1
description: Brass Compression Equal Tee - 10mm. Introducing the Equal Tee in a 10mm size, providing a convenient and heat-free solution for your plumbing needs. This compression fitting is WRAS approved, ensuring its reliability for both gas and water applications. Perfect for domestic and commercial heating, this equal tee simplifies system builds without the need for heat or solder. Easily tighten the nuts over the pipe, making it an ideal choice for quick and hassle-free installations on hot or cold systems.Other sizes Available: Brass Equal Tee - 6mm, 8mm, 10mm, 12mm, 15mm, 22mm, 28mm, 35mm, 42mm and 54mm. Technical Specifications: Brass Compression Equal Tee Manufactured From Brass Material: Brass Quality and Reliable Easy to Use We also have this available in other sizes Easy to install Size: 10mm ;
